title: Monimi: Vocaloid
description: Vocaloid charts for Monday Night Minin'
body:
# Monimi: Vocaloid

A pack for [Monday Night Minin'](https://modrinth.com/mod/monday-night-mining) that adds 4 vocaloid charts!

When installed alongside Monday Night Minin', these charts will become available to play at the speakers.

## Credits

"[ROT FOR CLOUT](https://jamiepaige.bandcamp.com/track/rot-for-clout)" by [Jamie Paige](https://jamiepaige.bandcamp.com/) is licensed under [CC BY-NC-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/). The song was cut to be shorter.

"[The 89's Momentum](https://myukke.bandcamp.com/track/the-89s-momentum)" by [MYUKKE.](https://myukke.bandcamp.com/) is used with permission.
